examples.context:
Q: Polymorphic type variables in type theory (e.g., α in id :: α → α) correspond to which physics concept?
A:
examples.truth: Gauge degrees of freedom (redundant descriptions of the same physics)

examples.context:
Q: The principal type (most general unifier) in type inference corresponds to what in gauge theory?
A:
examples.truth: Residual gauge freedom after fixing (minimal constraint for uniqueness)
distractors: Anomaly coefficient (quantum breaking of classical symmetry)
Wilson loop expectation value (nonlocal order parameter)
